properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Dragonbait is not unlocked with this skin. Dragonbait can only be unlocked by completing A Saurial's Resolve - the second Variant of the The Lost Love adventure in the Tomb of Annihilation Campaign.

backstory.original: Dragonbait is a champion of good and a saurial - a species that originated on a distant world and whose members have long lives. Very few saurials dwell in the Forgotten Realms, and no saurial communities are believed to exist anywhere in the world. The saurial's language is a combination of clicks and whistles beyond the human range of hearing, so Dragonbait relies on 'shouting' scents to communicate emotions. Dragonbait's known scents include: brimstone (confusion), roses (sadness), lemon (pleasure or joy), baked bread (anger), violets (danger or fear), honeysuckle (tenderness or concern), wood smoke (devotion or piety), tar (victory or celebration), and ham (nervousness or worry).
backstory.display: 龙饵是一名善良的勇士，也是一名爬虫人——这是个起源于遥远世界的种族，其成员拥有漫长的生命。很少有爬虫人居住在被遗忘的国度，据说世界上任何地方都没有爬虫人社区的存在。爬虫人的语言是由超出人类听觉范围的咔哒声和口哨声组合而成，所以龙饵依靠“喊叫”的气味来传达情感。龙饵的已知气味包括：硫磺石（混乱）、玫瑰（悲伤）、柠檬（快乐或喜悦）、烤面包（愤怒）、紫罗兰（危险或恐惧）、金银花（温柔或关切）、木烟（奉献或虔诚）、焦油（胜利或庆祝）和火腿（紧张或担忧）。

description.original: Dragonbait attacks the closest enemy with his sword, hitting all nearby enemies with a small cleave.
description.display: 龙饵用他的剑攻击距离最近的敌人，同时对附近所有敌人触发小顺势斩。

description.original: Dragonbait jumps out and strikes with his Holy Avenger, dealing damage to all enemies on screen and clearing any stun/charm effects on Champions.
description.display: 龙饵跳起并使用神圣复仇者发动攻击，对屏幕上的所有敌人造成伤害，并清除所有勇士身上的任何眩晕/魅惑效果。

longDescription.original: Dragonbait jumps out and strikes with his Holy Avenger, dealing damage to all enemies on screen and immediately clearing any stun/charm effects on Champions. Any Fiends or Undead left alive are marked with an overlay of the Holy Avenger. Champions who attack marked enemies deal 400% additional damage.
longDescription.display: 龙饵跳起并使用神圣复仇者发动攻击，对屏幕上的所有敌人造成伤害，并立即清除所有勇士身上的任何眩晕/魅惑效果。所有在此之后还存活的炼狱生物和亡灵会被神圣复仇者标记，勇士对被标记的敌人造成 400% 额外伤害。

description.desc: Increases the health of all other Champions in the formation by $(amount)% of Dragonbait's max health.
提升阵型中其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于龙饵最大生命值的 $(amount)%

tipText.original: Dragonbait increases the damage of nearby Champions. The range can be extended with clever formations.
tipText.display: 龙饵提高附近勇士的伤害。巧妙的阵型可以扩大其范围。

description.desc: The range of Shen-state is increased by $amount for each Healer Champion in the formation, stacking additively.
阵型中每位治疗者均使神态的范围扩大 $amount，以加算方式堆叠

Increase the effect of Shen State by $amount% for each enemy attacking Dragonbait and for each enemy enrage stack (additive). This effect is increased by $amount___2% for each other Tanking Champion in the formation.^^$shen_state_roasted_vegetables_description
每名攻击龙饵或使其堆叠怒气的敌人，均使神态的效果提高 $amount%（以加算方式堆叠）。阵型中每有另外一名坦克勇士，此效果就提升 $amount___2%^^$shen_state_roasted_vegetables_description

tipText.original: Dragonbait is a defensive tank, and will increase the damage of all Champions when he comes under attack.
tipText.display: 龙饵是一位防御型坦克，会在自身受到攻击时提高所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Shen State for each Support Champion in the formation. The increase amount is based on how close the Support Champion is to Dragonbait.^$shen_state_meat_sauce_description
阵型中每有一位支援型勇士，就会提升神态的效果。提升数值取决于支援型勇士与龙饵的距离有多近^$shen_state_meat_sauce_description

specializationDescription.original: Dragonbait emits a rich chicken-y scent which changes how his buffs affect his allies based on distance.
specializationDescription.display: 龙饵散发出浓郁的鸡肉味，根据距离改变他的增益对盟友的影响。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%
使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能效果提升 $(amount)%

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$sample_amount___2

specializationDescription.original: Dragonbait enjoys working alongside other defensive Champions, and emits a pleasantly spicy scent while doing so.
specializationDescription.display: 龙饵喜欢与其他防御型勇士并肩作战，并会在这种时候散发出令人愉悦的辛辣气味。

description.original: Deekin speaks for Dragonbait. Deekin understands bad smells.
description.display: 德金为龙饵开口说话。德金懂得那些可怕气味的意义。
[咔哒] [吹口哨] [咔哒] [咔哒] [小声吹口哨]

description.original: Deekin doesn't like when you call Dragonbait short.
description.display: 德金不喜欢你叫龙饵矮子。

description.original: Boss keeps getting up whenever he's knocked down.
description.display: 首领每次被打倒后，都会不断爬起来。

effects.description: Dragonbait's Shen State is increased by $(amount)%

description.original: Deekin thinks we should hit that really big thing.
description.display: 德金认为我们应该攻击那个超大的东西。

effects.description: Dragonbait's Shen State is increased by $(amount)%

description.original: He looks most content when he has allies to protect & a quarry to chase.
description.display: 当有盟友要保护、有猎物要追赶时，他看起来最为满足。

effects.description: Dragonbait takes $(amount) more enemies to get overwhelmed

description.original: Boss smells like a burning bakery.
description.display: 首领闻起来就像着火的面包店一样。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Dragonbait is a champion of good and a saurial - a species that originated on a distant world and whose members have long lives. Very few saurials dwell in the Forgotten Realms, and no saurial communities are believed to exist anywhere in the world. The saurial's language is a combination of clicks and whistles beyond the human range of hearing, so Dragonbait relies on 'shouting' scents to communicate emotions. Dragonbait's known scents include: brimstone (confusion), roses (sadness), lemon (pleasure or joy), baked bread (anger), violets (danger or fear), honeysuckle (tenderness or concern), wood smoke (devotion or piety), tar (victory or celebration), and ham (nervousness or worry).
character_sheet_details.system_description: Dragonbait, like all Saurials, communicates through smell. He buffs your party by smelling like meat pie, with your formation choices dictating some of the effects.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Dragonbait is not unlocked with this skin. Dragonbait can only be unlocked by completing A Saurial's Resolve - the second Variant of the The Lost Love adventure in the Tomb of Annihilation Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 龙饵是一名善良的勇士，也是一名爬虫人——这是个起源于遥远世界的种族，其成员拥有漫长的生命。很少有爬虫人居住在被遗忘的国度，据说世界上任何地方都没有爬虫人社区的存在。爬虫人的语言是由超出人类听觉范围的咔哒声和口哨声组合而成，所以龙饵依靠“喊叫”的气味来传达情感。龙饵的已知气味包括：硫磺石（混乱）、玫瑰（悲伤）、柠檬（快乐或喜悦）、烤面包（愤怒）、紫罗兰（危险或恐惧）、金银花（温柔或关切）、木烟（奉献或虔诚）、焦油（胜利或庆祝）和火腿（紧张或担忧）。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 龙饵和所有爬虫人一样通过气味沟通。他能通过肉馅饼的味道来为你的队伍提供增益，并根据你的阵型选择不同效果。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士龙饵不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“爬虫人的决心”——“湮灭之墓”战役中“失去的爱”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁龙饵。
